{{Missing Info}}

= Pumpkin Lucky Night =
[[File:Pumpkin Lucky Night Poster.png|200px|left|alt=Pumpkin Lucky Night]]
Oct. 25 - Oct. 31 2024

'''Official News Announcement:''' https://snail-na.qcplay.com/official/news-details.html?id=97
{{Clear}}

The player collects {{RewardIconWithText|Pumpkin Key}}s to open Magic Chests and draw rewards. Every {{RewardIconWithText|Pumpkin Key}} rewards {{RewardIconWithText|Pumpkin Coin}}s +50 and more can be earned through draws and other reward packs. The {{RewardIconWithText|Pumpkin Coin}}s can then be used to buy items in the Pumpkin Shop. 

In packs and randomly from the Magic Chests you can be rewarded {{RewardIconWithText|Candy Cane (Currency)}}. {{RewardIconWithText|Candy Cane (Currency)}} can be spent at the Mysterious Hut depending on the amount of draws at the Magic Chest.

= Relic Rewards =
* {{RewardIconWithLink|Halloween Choice Pack|orange}}
* {{RewardIconWithLink|Turnip Lamp|green}}

= Robot Rewards =
* {{RewardIconWithLink|Nutcracker Jack|orange|Robots}}
* {{RewardIconWithLink|Robot Ticket|orange}}

= Shell Rewards =
* {{RewardIconWithLink|Katrina Skeleton|purple}}
* {{RewardIconWithLink|Vampire Bat|purple}}

[[Category:Events]]
